seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: AI agents can now embed and use any app, perform detailed system/engineering design, and create 3D models for data centers/scientific research by mixing LLMs like Opus 4.8, GLM 5.2, and GPT 5.5.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Open-source repo gaining 4k+ stars rapidly; focuses on training coding agents for restraint and better engineering judgment rather than raw code generation.
Context compression tool for agent workflows that reduces costs by compressing tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before LLM processing.
Persistent code knowledge graphs as a memory layer specifically for coding agents.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Event details on expanded expo, poster sessions, verticals in AI, and sponsor credits for attendees.
near_misses.reason: Event announcement rather than technical innovation or new repo/framework.

notes: Limited high-signal technical posts from seed experts in the past 24h; global search surfaced open-source agent infrastructure repos as the strongest signals. Focused on actionable, understandable innovations in agents and memory/context handling.
